texto: She was the goddess of gossip and rumor, not the goddess of thoroughly fact-checked information. Some people, Principal Zeus included, didn't seem to realize that gossip wasn't, and never would be, an exact science. It was more of an art, really.
explicacao: Citação de Joan Holub & Suzanne Williams sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “She was the goddess of gossip and rumor, not the goddess of thoroughly fact-checked information. …” articula fe, gossip, greek-mythology em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como greek-mythology.
